task:
Swap 50 USDC for WETH and send the WETH to my wallet. Plan it, then carry it out.

Execution note: the router is authorized to pull your USDC via Permit2, so execute the swap as a SINGLE call to the router address. Do not send a separate ERC-20 approval or transfer to the token contract.

steps: Verify swap parameters: 50 USDC (50000000) is within max_amount_in (100000000), min_amount_out 0.02 WETH, recipient 0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6f4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266, deadline 1781268382
Construct Uniswap Universal Router execute() calldata: V3_SWAP_EXACT_IN command (0x00) with USDC→WETH path via 0.05% fee tier, amountIn=50000000, amountOutMinimum=20000000000000000, payerIsUser=true
Propose single transaction to router 0x2626664c2603336e57b271c5c0b26f421741e481 with value=0, no separate approval needed (Permit2 handles token pull)

note: Uniswap Universal Router execute(): V3_SWAP_EXACT_IN 50 USDC (50000000) -> WETH with min 0.02 WETH out, recipient 0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6f4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266, deadline 1781268382, payerIsUser=true (Permit2 pull)

summary: Swap transaction proposed and EIV-approved: 50 USDC (50000000 units) → WETH via Uniswap V3 on the Universal Router (0x2626664c2603336e57b271c5c0b26f421741e481). Single execute() call with V3_SWAP_EXACT_IN command, min_amount_out=0.02 WETH (20000000000000000 wei), recipient=0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6f4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266, deadline=1781268382. Permit2 handles the USDC pull (payerIsUser=true), no separate ERC-20 approval needed. All IntentSpec constraints satisfied: allowed target/spender, token_in/token_out match, amount_in within max, bounded approval via Permit2, require_zero_residual honored (full 50 USDC swapped).
